what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline icon depicting a workstation or monitor, with a rounded screen rectangle, internal horizontal divider, stand/base, and small centered circle, styled with currentColor strokes.
observations: Uses an SVG viewBox of 0 0 24 24 with explicit width and height of 24.
Sets fill to none and uses currentColor for stroke inheritance.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the main monitor body as a rounded rectangle from x=3 y=4 to x=21 y=17.
Includes a horizontal line across the lower screen area at y=13.
Includes a centered vertical stand and base line below the screen.
Includes a centered circle inside the screen at cx=12 cy=9 r=2.
standouts: Current-color outline styling makes it adaptable to surrounding UI color.
The icon combines monitor frame, stand, and a centered circular detail.
conventions: Uses presentation attributes directly on the root svg element.
Uses primitive SVG elements rather than embedded paths for all geometry.
Keeps the icon fill-free and stroke-driven.
concerns: Single-line markup makes manual inspection and diffs less readable.
notes: A reusable current-color outline workstation icon built from simple SVG primitives.
questions: What does the centered circle represent within the workstation screen?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a workstation icon, and the SVG content depicts a monitor/workstation form.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable interface icon for a workstation or computer-display concept while inheriting color from its rendering context.
contribution: Contributes a compact current-color workstation/monitor icon with a rounded display, screen detail, and stand geometry for use in a fused design asset set.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 current-color SVG outline icon showing a workstation or monitor with a rounded screen, divider, stand, base, and centered circular screen detail.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a workstation or computer-display concept as a reusable design-system icon.
